steps.text: Listen carefully — then press what I say. Ready? Press... wake up.
You listened and found it! Wake up — first thing in the morning. Listen again. Press... bedtime.
You heard it and found it! Bedtime — last thing at night. This one is trickier. Listen first — then press. Press... dinner.
Great listening! You remembered dinner. Last one. Listen carefully. Press... lunch.
steps.feedback: You did it — you listened every time and found the right one. Brilliant listening!
